languages.text: {n}Уставившись на дымящееся оружие, Соломон нехотя цедит:{/n} "Случается".
{n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."
languages.original_text: {n}Уставившись на дымящееся оружие, Соломон нехотя цедит:{/n} "Случается".

languages.text: « Ça m'arrive, » {n}répond Solomorne à contrecœur, les yeux rivés sur son arme encore chaude.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."

traits.locale_text: « Ça m'arrive, » {n}répond Solomorne à contrecœur, les yeux rivés sur son arme encore chaude.{/n}

languages.text: {n}煙を上げる銃を見つめながら、ソロモーンはしぶしぶ歯の隙間から言葉を押し出した。{/n}「…時々」
languages.original_text: {n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."

traits.locale_text: {n}煙を上げる銃を見つめながら、ソロモーンはしぶしぶ歯の隙間から言葉を押し出した。{/n}「…時々」

languages.text: {n}Solomorne mira su pistola humeante y, a regañadientes, masculla:{/n} «De vez en cuando».
languages.original_text: {n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne mira su pistola humeante y, a regañadientes, masculla:{/n} «De vez en cuando».

languages.text: {n}索罗蒙盯着冒烟的枪口，不情愿地回答道。{/n}“有时候会。”
languages.original_text: {n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."

traits.locale_text: {n}索罗蒙盯着冒烟的枪口，不情愿地回答道。{/n}“有时候会。”

languages.text: {n}Namlusundan hâlâ duman çıkan silaha bakarak dişlerinin arasından tıslıyor.{/n} "Bazen."
languages.original_text: {n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."

traits.locale_text: {n}Namlusundan hâlâ duman çıkan silaha bakarak dişlerinin arasından tıslıyor.{/n} "Bazen."

languages.text: {n}Solomorne betrachtet seine rauchende Waffe und erwidert zögernd: {/n}"Ab und an."
languages.original_text: {n}Staring at the smoking gun, Solomorne reluctantly grits out,{/n} "Sometimes."
